narrative:
Precinct Norwalk 1-B (precinct in Huron County) has 1,194 registered voters, with 58.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.5%, a modest Republican lean of 4.8 percentage points.
